supabase.name: raynft_
supabase.notes: CONFIRMED SCAM (Solana): Stole $1,200+ USD in Solana tokens. Promoted wallet drainer site https://app.solstreamflow.finance/ claiming to be a "developer token locker". Victim connected wallet and all tokens were stolen. SCAM PATTERN: Legitimate-looking account (Verified, 13+ years, 325K followers) promotes drainer site — likely hacked account or paid promotion. SITE: https://app.solstreamflow.finance/ appears to be a Solana wallet drainer (fake token locker service). CHAIN: Solana. NEED: Original recommendation screenshot/post (likely DM), transaction hashes, drainer's receiving wallet address, timestamp. Account may be compromised — legitimate credentials used for malicious promotion.
